svg.text: Framework Page Analysis Pipeline (Ollama-First)
Applies to framework assessment pages. Excludes content-comparison and multi-page-scraping.
Stage 1 - Collect
Inputs: URL + optional proposed content + framework selection
Output: canonical payload (url, snapshotId, collectedAt, collectorType, rawEvidence, proposedContent?)
snapshotId is generated here and becomes the primary key downstream
Stage 2 - Persist
Store canonical payload in LocalForage keyed by snapshotId
Write traceability hashes: existing, proposed, analysis
Reuse gate: once saved, never re-scrape unless explicitly requested
Stage 3 - Analyze
Ollama-first execution
Chunking: 1 category for long/large or timeout-prone runs; 2 categories for moderate runs
Flow: chunk blocks -> merge outputs -> unified synthesis -> validate all scores are 0.0 to 1.0
Completeness check: all required framework elements must be present and scored
Stage 4 - Report
Save chunked + unified + readable markdown reports under same snapshotId
Expose tabs: Raw payload / Analyzed output / Traceability-version history
Allow regeneration of reports without recollecting raw data
Reuse patterns:
- Re-run same framework on same snapshotId
- Run multiple frameworks on one snapshotId
- Compare proposed versions on one base snapshot
